texto: She was tempted to take the elevator instead of the stairs just this once. But that was how it started. Take the elevator tonight because she was tired and her feet hurt from having been trapped in three-inch stilettos all day, and then tomorrow she'd want to take it because she was running late. Then, the next thing she knew she'd be taking elevators all over the place because she got winded climbing stairs.
explicacao: Citação de Melissa F. Miller sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “She was tempted to take the elevator instead of the stairs just this once. Then, the next thing she knew she'd be taking elevators all over the place because she got winded climbing stairs.
